2606.24841.title: Matching Tasks to Objectives: Fine-Tuning and Prompt-Tuning Strategies for Encoder-Decoder Pre-trained Language Models
2606.24841.paper_summary: Prompt-based learning has emerged as a dominant paradigm in natural language processing. This study explores the impact of diverse pre-training objectives on the performance of encoder-decoder pre-trained language models across generation and question answering tasks, with a focus on commonsense knowledge retrieval and completion. We highlight the benefits of incorporating multiple objectives during both pre-training and fine-tuning stages. We introduce the Match Task to Objective (MTO) framework and methods for determining the appropriate objective for a given task. This framework offers automated methods to prepare task-related data for adaptation through unsupervised training, based on the identified objective. In the fine-tuning stage, we design novel templates that align with the objectives of the pre-training and adaptation stages. When aligned with task requirements, these strategies can achieve a performance gain of over 120\% compared to conventional methods in few-shot settings. They significantly outperform related works in few-shot settings and exceed the baseline even in full-dataset scenarios. Furthermore, we extend this approach to include prompt-tuning methodologies, providing guidance for more effective soft prompt engineering and optimization. Our strategies significantly enhance prompt-tuning performance as well. These insights hold substantial value, precisely guiding the selection and optimization of models customized for specific tasks. Code is available at https://github.com/puraminy/MTO/
2606.24841.paper_summary_zh: 提示導向學習已成為自然語言處理中的主導範式。<lb/>本研究探討了多樣化的預訓練目標對編碼器-解碼器預訓練語言模型在生成和問題回答任務中的表現影響，重點關注常識知識的檢索和補全。<lb/>我們強調在預訓練和微調階段整合多個目標的好處。<lb/>我們介紹了匹配任務到目標（Match Task to Objective, MTO）框架及確定特定任務適當目標的方法。<lb/>該框架提供自動化方法，基於識別的目標準備與任務相關的數據以進行無監督訓練。<lb/>在微調階段，我們設計了與預訓練和適應階段目標相符的新模板。<lb/>當這些策略與任務要求對齊時，能夠在少量樣本設定中實現超過120\%的性能增益，與傳統方法相比。<lb/>它們在少量樣本設定中顯著超越相關工作，甚至在完整數據集場景中也超過基準。<lb/>此外，我們將這一方法擴展到包括提示調整方法，為更有效的軟提示工程和優化提供指導。<lb/>我們的策略同樣顯著提升了提示調整的性能。<lb/>這些見解具有重要價值，能精確指導為特定任務定制模型的選擇和優化。<lb/>代碼可在 https://github.com/puraminy/MTO/ 獲得。
2606.24841.author: Ahmad Pouramini et.al.
